zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Pennington於1200年出生在英國波藍德蒙卡斯特時，他的父親Sir Alan Pennington41歲，母親Agnes de Longville27歲。他於1232年與Agnes Longvillers Greystoke在英國藍卡爾維根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1248年12月10日在他的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Pennington于1200年出生在英国波藍德蒙卡斯特时，他的父亲Sir Alan Pennington41岁，母亲Agnes de Longville27岁。他于1232年与Agnes Longvillers Greystoke在英国藍卡爾維根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1248年12月10日在他的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pennington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Pennington in Furness (Lancashire), which derives from Old English pening ‘penny’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, or from Pennington in Leigh (Lancashire), which probably derives from the Old English personal name Pinna + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + Old English tūn.
habitational name from Pennington (Hampshire), or from Penton Grafton or Penton Mewsey (both Hampshire); see   Penton  . All have the same etymology as Pennington in Furness; see 1 above.

variants.name: Penington
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Pennington  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.
History: Edward Penington, born in 1667 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, was appointed surveyor-general of the province of PA in 1698 and accompanied William Penn to Philadelphia.

variants.name: Penton
meanings: habitational name from Penton Grafton or Penton Mewsey (both Hanmpshire), or from a shortened form of Pennington 2. The placenames denoted a farm or estate for which a penny tax was payable (Old English pening ‘penny’ + tūn).
in north-west England, a shortened form of   Pennington   1, from either of the places called Pennington in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Pennington was born in 1200, in Muncaster, Cumberland, England, his father, Sir Alan Pennington, was 41 and his mother, Agnes de Longville, was 27. He married Agnes Longvillers Greystoke in 1232, in Wigan, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 10 December 1248, in his hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Pennington est né en 1200, à Muncaster, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alan Pennington, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Longville, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Longvillers Greystoke en 1232, à Wigan, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 10 décembre 1248, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Pennington 1200 in Muncaster, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alan Pennington 41 und seine Mutter Agnes de Longville 27. Er hat 1232 in Wigan, Lancashire, England Agnes Longvillers Greystoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 10. Dezember 1248 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Pennington è nato il nel 1200 nel Muncaster, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir Alan Pennington, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Longville, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Longvillers Greystoke nel 1232, nel Wigan, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 10 dicembre 1248, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Penningtonが1200年にイギリスクウンバーランドムンカスターで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Penningtonは41歳，母Agnes de Longvilleは27歳であった。1232年にイギリスランカシュアイアウィガンでAgnes Longvillers Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1248年12月10日に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Pennington(이)가 1200년 영국 쿠벌랜드 먼카스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alan Pennington(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Longville(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1232년 영국 랭카실르 위건에서 Agnes Longvillers Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1248년 12월 10일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Pennington nasceu em 1200, em Muncaster, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alan Pennington, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Longville, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Longvillers Greystoke em 1232, em Wigan, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 10 de dezembro de 1248, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Pennington родился в 1200 г. в местности мункастир, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alan Pennington было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Longville, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Longvillers Greystoke в 1232 г. в местности виган, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 10 декабря 1248 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Pennington nació en 1200, en Muncaster, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alan Pennington, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Agnes de Longville, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Agnes Longvillers Greystoke en 1232, en Wigan, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 10 de diciembre de 1248, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años.
